issues.title: Unsupported parameter: 'temperature' when using reasoning model like o3-mini
issues.body:
**Bug description**
Error message "Unsupported parameter: 'temperature' is not supported with this model.\" is thrown when using OpenAiChatModel with a reasoning model, when no temperature is set. I think this is because of the OpenAiChatModel defaultOptions that provide a temperature parameter per default.

**Steps to reproduce**
```
 val builder = OpenAiChatOptions.builder().reasoningEffort("low").model("o3-mini");
 val prompt = Prompt(messages,builder.build())
 val response = openaiChatModel.call(prompt)
```

comments.body: You are right, it was autowired and used the deprecated contructor. Closing this.
Thanks for confirming @andreasmuelder! Happy we could pinpoint the issue.
